criteria.reason: Structured active patterns are loaded and impact events are recorded.
Service result impact metrics are computed and stored.
Telegram health screen and disable buttons are wired.
Production backup and Alembic migration completed.
Relevant local tests and production smoke checks passed; unrelated full-suite failures are documented.
